# Whistle AI

> AI-powered export management platform for Korean manufacturers and global buyers

## About
Whistle AI is a comprehensive export trade platform that connects Korean manufacturers with global buyers. It provides AI-driven market analysis, HS code classification, FTA benefit calculations, export document automation, and cost simulation tools.

## Key Features
- AI Market Analysis: 13-section export market analysis with real data
- HS Code Classification: AI-powered harmonized system code lookup
- FTA Calculator: Free trade agreement benefit simulation
- Export Cost Simulator: Comprehensive export cost estimation
- Document Automation: Commercial invoice, packing list, B/L generation
- Buyer-Manufacturer Matching: Direct connection marketplace
- Escrow Payment: Stripe-secured payment protection
- Deal Room: Real-time negotiation and project management
- Korean Trend Search: Real-time trending product data from Korean marketplaces
- Certification Guidance: FDA, CE, HALAL, ISO step-by-step guidance
- Alibaba Store Optimization: AI-powered product listing optimization

## Target Users
- Korean manufacturers seeking global markets
- Global buyers sourcing Korean products (K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Tech, K-Fashion)
- Export voucher (수출바우처) beneficiary companies
- Export consultants and trade agencies

## Pricing
- Free: Basic market analysis preview
- Starter: $29/month - Single market analysis
- Professional: $79/month - Multi-market analysis + documents
- Enterprise: $199/month - Unlimited analysis + priority support
- Single Analysis: $9.90 one-time
- Buyer accounts: 100% free
